entity.summary: Solana automated-market-maker exchange infrastructure used by the MetaDAO ecosystem for spot token swaps and liquidity pools alongside market-governed fundraising and decision-market operations.
entity.notes: Current first-party MetaDAO website remains reachable and documents its market-governed fundraising and trading-oriented ecosystem. DefiLlama independently classifies Futarchy AMM as a Solana AMM DEX and reports current TVL, fees, revenue, and DEX volume. Confidence is medium because the first-party public root surface presents the broader MetaDAO platform rather than a standalone AMM-only product page.

evidence.title: MetaDAO official website
evidence.notes: Current first-party MetaDAO website remains reachable and documents project launches, market oversight, decision markets, trading-based governance, and links to official documentation.

evidence.title: Futarchy AMM metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol registry classifies Futarchy AMM as a Solana AMM DEX and reports current TVL, fees, revenue, and spot DEX volume.

evidence.title: Futarchy AMM DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies Futarchy AMM as a Solana decentralized exchange.
